ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection for this sector */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data for this sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsectors" (
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsector */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the subsector belongs to */,
  "subsector_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsector */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection for this subsector */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data for this subsector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the dataset belongs to */,
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subsector the dataset belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata associated with the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Exact date when the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_subsector_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsector_id") REFERENCES subsectors ("subsector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect and process the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data */,
  "quality_assurance" TEXT /* Quality assurance measures taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
